user_prompt: Customize my resume for this Stripe Senior Frontend role: [link]. Emphasize PCI and performance work.
actual_output:
I have received your request to customize your resume for the Senior Frontend Engineer role at Stripe. Since you provided a placeholder link, I cannot access the specific job description to perform a precise keyword analysis.

Please provide the full job description text or a valid URL so I can proceed with the following:

### Customization Plan

1.  **ATS Keyword Optimization:** I will scan the job description for specific technical requirements (e.g., React, TypeScript, GraphQL, specific performance metrics) and integrate them into your professional summary and skills section.
2.  **PCI Compliance Emphasis:** I will restructure your experience bullets to highlight your history with secure payment processing, data handling, and compliance-heavy environments.
3.  **Performance Metrics:** I will rewrite your bullet points to focus on quantifiable performance improvements (e.g., "Reduced bundle size by X%," "Improved LCP by Yms," "Optimized re-renders in complex React trees").
4.  **Stripe-Specific Alignment:** I will tailor your "Projects" or "Experience" section to mirror the engineering challenges Stripe typically prioritizes, such as API-first development and high-scale UI architecture.

**Please paste the job description below, and I will generate the optimized resume content immediately.**
judge_reasoning: The chatbot substantively addressed the request by outlining a specific customization plan and only requested the necessary job description text to complete the task.
